narrative:
Cols 26-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 740 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 42.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 38.2 percentage points.
